steps.title: Identify the grammatical role needed
steps.content: The blank is the subject of the verb "are descendants" inside the subordinate clause "because ______ are descendants of Proto-Kru." The subject must be a plural subject pronoun referring to "thirty-eight languages."

steps.title: Apply pronoun case and meaning rules, then eliminate
steps.content:
The blank needs a plural subject pronoun. "Thirty-eight languages" is plural, so the pronoun must be plural too.

A. its — singular possessive pronoun; cannot be a subject and is singular. Eliminated.
B. they're — contraction of "they are"; provides the plural subject "they" followed by the verb "are," agreeing with "are descendants." Correct.
C. their — plural possessive pronoun; cannot serve as a subject. Eliminated.
D. it's — contraction of "it is"; singular subject, does not agree with plural "languages." Eliminated.

B is correct.
